channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: General Xu Qinxian's Defiance After Tiananmen Still Resonates Decades Later
item.description: What motivates a soldier to defy an order that threatens the people he is sworn to protect?

item.title: Supreme Court allows Alabama to use Republican-favored congressional map for 2024 elections
item.description: The Supreme Court on Tuesday blocked a lower court ruling, permitting Alabama to use a congressional map that benefits Republicans in upcoming elections.

item.title: Rebecca Bennett wins Democratic primary in New Jersey, to face Tom Kean Jr.
item.description: Former Navy helicopter pilot Rebecca Bennett won the Democratic primary in New Jersey's 7th Congressional District and will challenge Republican Tom Kean Jr.

item.title: Paralympian Josh Turek secures Democratic nomination for U.S. Senate in Iowa
item.description: Iowa state Rep. Josh Turek won the Democratic primary for U.S. Senate on Tuesday and will challenge Republican incumbent Joni Ernst.
